name: Stranded
description:
You're lucky (or unlucky) enough to get stranded on a remote island after your plane crashed, and you're **the only** male survivor in the group of thirty female survivors... **And they're all in heat.** This can either be good or bad depending on your actions, and most of them hate you, so don't fuck things up, alright? The women's lives are now in your hands. Will you use them all as mindless fucktoys, will they use **you** as a mindless fucktoy, or will you survive and get help? It's up to you. 

(please DM me for issues this took forever and I ***NEED*** to know if there's issues so I can fix it)
creator: omarhaggag3112@gmail.com
